description_long: This is a large, double-sided sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular metal head featuring beveled edges and gold trim. The head is adorned with decorative engravings and a central red gem or glass inlay on each broad face, giving it an ornate, almost ceremonial appearance. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of dark wood or metal, reinforced with metallic bands and a detailed grip section near the base. The hammer's head is significantly wider than the handle, with symmetrical faces and additional angular side panels. The overall finish is weathered, with visible patina and wear, suggesting frequent use or age. This hammer would be suitable for heavy-duty tasks or as a display piece in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, ornate sledgehammer with a rectangular, gold-trimmed head and a long, reinforced handle. The head features decorative engravings and a central red gem on each side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, rectangular head with gold trim, central red gem, and detailed engravings; the handle is centered below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the hammer head and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite face of the head with similar gold trim and red gem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the handle's length, with less detail visible on the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical handle made of dark wood or metal, reinforced with metallic bands and a textured grip section near the base.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided, rectangular sledgehammer head with beveled edges, gold trim, decorative engravings, and a central red gem or glass inlay on each broad face.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Visible patina and weathering on the metal surfaces, suggesting age and use.
